chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No. D- 100 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 30.01.2024. M/s Qurban Ali Malano and Syed Israr Ali Shah, Advocates for the petitioner. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer, Election Commission of Pakistan. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G along with Syed Ahmed Fawad Deputy Commissioner/D.R.O Khairpur. -.-.-.-.-.-.- This petition is disposed of with consent in the terms whereby on the current Polling Station District Returning Officer, Khairpur will provide security to the candidates in terms of Section 59 of Elections Act, 2017. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan/PA
